_README: SHADOW PRICING. Both accounts here are subscription-metered (Claude Code:
service_tier=standard w/ 1h cache; Codex: ChatGPT plan_type=prolite, billed as
percent-of-weekly-window). Neither side bills per token, so NO invoice exists.
Everything below is tokens x published API list rate. It is a model, not money.
TOKENS are the ground truth; dollars are a derived comparison unit.
Anthropic rates are from the vendor's own accounting -- Claude Code emits
costUSD per model directly, and we prefer that over recomputing.
(not an aggregator blog). cached_input is an explicit per-model rate there, so
we use it directly rather than assuming a 0.1x multiplier.

cache_multipliers._note: Applied to the INPUT rate. Anthropic: read 0.1x, write 1.25x (5m) / 2.0x (1h).
